summary: Educational Python learning application with practice exercises
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Friendly Python logo or mascot illustration with educational theme for the homepage hero section (python-hero.dim_800x400.png)
- Icon representing tutorials or learning with book and code symbols (tutorials-icon.dim_256x256.png)
- Icon representing practice exercises with code editor and checkmark symbols (practice-icon.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that welcomes users and provides an overview of the Python learning platform with navigation to tutorials and practice sections

Implement a tutorials section with Python programming lessons organized by difficulty level (beginner, intermediate) covering core concepts like variables, data types, loops, functions, and basic data structures
Create a practice exercises section where users can write and run Python code directly in the browser to solve programming challenges
Store user progress on tutorials and practice exercises so they can track which lessons they have completed and which exercises they have solved

Apply a creative, educational visual design theme with warm, encouraging colors and clear typography that makes learning feel accessible and non-intimidating, with consistent styling across tutorials and practice sections

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement a code execution system that safely runs user-submitted Python code and returns output or error messages
